summary: Iteration 117 - Bug Fix Verification Complete. All 11 backend tests passed. All 3 frontend routes (/workflows, /analytics, /agent-studio) verified working correctly with proper workspace-scoped redirects.

issues: Minor 404 errors for /api/workspaces/{id}/tools endpoint (not critical, endpoint may not exist yet)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes from Nexus_Bug_Fix_Brief.docx all verified: 1) /api/settings/ai-keys/test no longer returns debug field in response. 2) /api/workspaces/{id}/memory/upload accepts Bearer auth. 3) /api/workspaces/{id}/image-to-video returns 501 immediately (fail-fast). 4) /api/workspaces/{id}/media/jobs still returns 200 and responsive. 5) routes/__init__.py no longer imports routes_media (no double registration). 6) Frontend routes /workflows, /analytics, /agent-studio all redirect to workspace-scoped views correctly.

debug_info_leakage_fix.details: POST /api/settings/ai-keys/test response contains no debug, debug_info, request_headers, response_headers, response_body, timestamp, or endpoint fields

bearer_auth_memory_upload.details: POST /api/workspaces/{id}/memory/upload with Bearer token in Authorization header works (no 401)

image_to_video_fail_fast.details: POST /api/workspaces/{id}/image-to-video returns 501 in <1 second with source_image_id, returns 400 without it

media_jobs_responsive.details: POST /api/workspaces/{id}/media/jobs returns 200 with job_id in <2 seconds, GET also works

routes_media_no_double_registration.details: routes/__init__.py does not contain 'routes_media' import - verified by file content check

media_endpoints_no_cascade_failure.details: All media endpoints (GET /media, GET /media/config, GET /media/folders, GET /media/metrics) work independently

frontend_workflows_route.details: /workflows redirects to /workspace/{id}?tab=workflows with 'Workflows' page content visible

frontend_analytics_route.details: /analytics redirects to /workspace/{id}?tab=analytics with 'AI Agent Analytics' page content visible

frontend_agent_studio_route.details: /agent-studio redirects to /workspace/{id}?tab=studio with 'Agent Creator Studio' page content visible
